series_metadata.series_title: External individual, agency, and organization training records
series_metadata.series_description: All records related to training provided by the Ohio Department of Public Safety (ODPS) to external individuals, agencies, and organizations.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: current year three years from date of training. If training is related grant funding, date of federal "Final Financial Report" applicable grant. ; Electronic: current year three years from date of training. If training is related grant funding, date of federal "Final Financial Report" applicable grant
